inputs.description: Phase title (optional) (e.g. Canvas Structural Parity). Leave blank if none.
Phase slug for archive file (e.g. phase-7-canvas-structural-parity)

tasks.label: HAVDM: Prompts — Open Claude Feature Prompt
HAVDM: Prompts — Open Codex Playwright Fix Prompt
HAVDM: Prompts — Open Shared AI Rules
HAVDM: Prompts — Open Shared Verification Rules
HAVDM: Governance — Generate Phase Activation Prompt (scratch file)
args:
mkdir -p .vscode && PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=""; if [ -n "${input:phaseTitle}" ]; then PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=" – ${input:phaseTitle}"; fi; cat > .vscode/HAVDM_PHASE_ACTIVATION_PROMPT.md <<EOF
# HAVDM Phase Activation Prompt (File-Write Mode)

Read docs/governance/PHASE_ORCHESTRATION_FRAMEWORK.md in full.

Activate governance mode for:

PHASE_NAME: Phase ${input:phaseNumber}${PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX}
CURRENT_VERSION: ${input:currentVersion}
INITIATION_VERSION: ${input:initiationVersion}

Constraints:

- Governance mode only.
- Do NOT implement code.
- Write the governance blueprint directly to:
  docs/governance/phases/${input:phaseSlug}-blueprint.md
- Include required metadata header.
- Validate CURRENT_VERSION against package.json.
- Validate INITIATION_VERSION bump logic.
- If version progression is ambiguous → STOP and ask.
- Explicitly enforce ai_rules.md compliance.
- Produce executable feature prompts for every slice.
- Include packaging plan.
- Include Stop Conditions.
- Include Medium Gate prompt.
- Stage the file and prepare commit message.
- Ask before committing.

Output only:
- Confirmation that file was written
- Filename
- Proposed commit message
- Ask whether to commit
EOF
code -r .vscode/HAVDM_PHASE_ACTIVATION_PROMPT.md

tasks.label: HAVDM: Governance — Generate Medium Gate Archive Prompt (scratch file)
args:
mkdir -p .vscode && PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=""; if [ -n "${input:phaseTitle}" ]; then PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=" – ${input:phaseTitle}"; fi; cat > .vscode/HAVDM_MEDIUM_GATE_PROMPT.md <<EOF
# HAVDM Medium Gate Prompt (Archive Mode)

Read the phase blueprint at:
- docs/governance/phases/${input:phaseSlug}-blueprint.md

Run the Medium Gate audit (governance mode only):

Constraints:
- Do NOT implement code.
- Do NOT modify non-governance files.
- Audit architecture compliance, regression stability, performance budgets, YAML compatibility, Monaco correctness, IPC integrity, and adherence to ai_rules.md.
- Produce severity ratings, Go/No-Go decision, and confidence score.

After producing the Medium Gate output:

1) Ensure directory exists:
   docs/governance/phases/

2) Write the Medium Gate report to:
   docs/governance/phases/${input:phaseSlug}-medium-gate.md

3) Include header metadata:
   Phase Name: Phase ${input:phaseNumber}${PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX}
   Related Blueprint: ${input:phaseSlug}-blueprint.md
   CURRENT_VERSION: ${input:currentVersion}
   Evaluated On: <ISO timestamp>
   Governance Mode: HARD MODE++
   AI Model: <model name>
   References:
     - ai_rules.md
     - docs/governance/PHASE_ORCHESTRATION_FRAMEWORK.md

4) Stage the report and propose a commit message:
   chore(governance): add medium gate for ${input:phaseSlug}

5) Ask the user whether to commit.
EOF
code -r .vscode/HAVDM_MEDIUM_GATE_PROMPT.md

tasks.label: HAVDM: Governance — Open Current Phase Blueprint (by slug)
HAVDM: Meta — Phase Orchestrator (Start/Close)
args:
set -euo pipefail; ACTION="${input:phaseAction}"; if [ "$ACTION" = "start" ]; then ./tools/feature-start "${input:name}"; mkdir -p .vscode; PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=""; if [ -n "${input:phaseTitle}" ]; then PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=" – ${input:phaseTitle}"; fi; cat > .vscode/HAVDM_PHASE_ACTIVATION_PROMPT.md <<EOF
# HAVDM Phase Activation Prompt (File-Write Mode)

Read docs/governance/PHASE_ORCHESTRATION_FRAMEWORK.md in full.

Activate governance mode for:

PHASE_NAME: Phase ${input:phaseNumber}${PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX}
CURRENT_VERSION: ${input:currentVersion}
INITIATION_VERSION: ${input:initiationVersion}

Constraints:

- Governance mode only.
- Do NOT implement code.
- Write the governance blueprint directly to:
  docs/governance/phases/${input:phaseSlug}-blueprint.md
- Include required metadata header.
- Validate CURRENT_VERSION against package.json.
- Validate INITIATION_VERSION bump logic.
- If version progression is ambiguous → STOP and ask.
- Explicitly enforce ai_rules.md compliance.
- Produce executable feature prompts for every slice.
- Include packaging plan.
- Include Stop Conditions.
- Include Medium Gate prompt.
- Stage the file and prepare commit message.
- Ask before committing.

Output only:
- Confirmation that file was written
- Filename
- Proposed commit message
- Ask whether to commit
EOF
code -r .vscode/HAVDM_PHASE_ACTIVATION_PROMPT.md; else mkdir -p .vscode; PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=""; if [ -n "${input:phaseTitle}" ]; then PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX=" – ${input:phaseTitle}"; fi; cat > .vscode/HAVDM_MEDIUM_GATE_PROMPT.md <<EOF
# HAVDM Medium Gate Prompt (Archive Mode)

Read the phase blueprint at:
- docs/governance/phases/${input:phaseSlug}-blueprint.md

Run the Medium Gate audit (governance mode only):

Constraints:
- Do NOT implement code.
- Do NOT modify non-governance files.
- Audit architecture compliance, regression stability, performance budgets, YAML compatibility, Monaco correctness, IPC integrity, and adherence to ai_rules.md.
- Produce severity ratings, Go/No-Go decision, and confidence score.

After producing the Medium Gate output:

1) Ensure directory exists:
   docs/governance/phases/

2) Write the Medium Gate report to:
   docs/governance/phases/${input:phaseSlug}-medium-gate.md

3) Include header metadata:
   Phase Name: Phase ${input:phaseNumber}${PHASE_TITLE_SUFFIX}
   Related Blueprint: ${input:phaseSlug}-blueprint.md
   CURRENT_VERSION: ${input:currentVersion}
   Evaluated On: <ISO timestamp>
   Governance Mode: HARD MODE++
   AI Model: <model name>
   References:
     - ai_rules.md
     - docs/governance/PHASE_ORCHESTRATION_FRAMEWORK.md

4) Stage the report and propose a commit message:
   chore(governance): add medium gate for ${input:phaseSlug}

5) Ask the user whether to commit.
EOF
code -r .vscode/HAVDM_MEDIUM_GATE_PROMPT.md; ./tools/feature-finish "${input:name}"; fi

tasks.label: HAVDM: Governance — Open Archived Phases Folder
HAVDM: Quality — Test Last Failed (trace retain)
HAVDM: Git — Update Main (FF Only)
tasks.command: git fetch origin && git checkout main && git pull --ff-only origin main
